query: How are BMS maps defined with DFHMSD and DFHMDI?

results.name: CCRDLIA
results.content:

results.content:

               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM

results.name: COBIL0A
results.content:
COBIL0A DFHMDI COLUMN=1,                                               -
               LINE=1,                                                 -
               SIZE=(24,80) 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Tran:' 
TRNNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=4,                                               -
               POS=(1,7) 
TITLE01 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(1,21) 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Date:' 
CURDATE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(1,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='mm/dd/yy' 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Prog:' 
PGMNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,7) 
TITLE02 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(2,21) 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Time:' 
CURTIME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='hh:mm:ss' 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT),                                      -
               COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=12,                                              -
               POS=(4,35),                                             -
               INITIAL='Bill Payment' 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               LENGTH=14,                                              -
               POS=(6,6),                                              -
               INITIAL='Enter Acct ID:' 
ACTIDIN DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,IC,NORM,UNPROT),                            -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=11,                                              -
               POS=(6,21) 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(6,33) 
        DFHMDF COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=70,                                              -
               POS=(8,6),                                              -
               INITIAL='------------------------------------------------
               -----------------------' 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=25,                                              -
               POS=(11,6),                                             -
               INITIAL='Your current balance is: ' 
CURBAL  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=14,                                              -
               POS=(11,32) 
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(11,47) 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=53,                                              -
               POS=(15,6),                                             -
               INITIAL='Do you want to pay your balance now. Please con-
               firm: ' 
CONFIRM DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,UNPROT),                               -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=1,                                               -
               POS=(15,60) 
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(15,62) 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(15,63),                                            -
               INITIAL='(Y/N)' 
ERRMSG  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT,FSET),                                 -
               COLOR=RED,                                              -
               LENGTH=78,                                              -
               POS=(23,1) 
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=33,                                              -
               POS=(24,1),                                             -
               INITIAL='ENTER=Continue  F3=Back  F4=Clear' 
        DFHMSD TYPE=FINAL
        END

*
* Ver: CardDemo_v1.0-70-g193b394-123 Date: 2022-08-22 17:02:42 CDT
*
